figures.caption: Fig. 3. Visual comparison of different reconstruction methods on the MSCM dataset under extreme bandwidth constraints. SALD accurately preserves critical structural boundaries and restores high-fidelity textures without generative hallucinations.
TABLE I QUANTITATIVE COMPARISON ON MSCM AND UCMERCED DATASETS

Fig. 1. The overall architecture of the proposed Structure-Aware Latent Diffusion (SALD) framework. It adopts an asymmetric edge-cloud collaborative design to achieve bandwidth-efficient super-resolution.

Fig. 2. Detailed architecture of the Structure-Gated Large Kernel (SGLK) module. It consists of three parallel branches: a Detail Branch for local feature extraction, a Context Branch that incorporates the structural prior (P(·)) via sigmoid-gated modulation, and a Projection Branch for linear learning.
